# 📋 IMMEDIATE ACTION REQUIRED: Add GitHub Secret

## The Problem
Your GitHub Actions workflow failed because **`KUBE_CONFIG` secret is missing**.

## The Solution (Copy-Paste, 2 minutes)

1. Copy this base64-encoded kubeconfig:
```

```

2. Go to GitHub Settings:
   - https://github.com/ratnakarchakkapalli/simple-k8s-cicd/settings/secrets/actions

3. Click "New repository secret"

4. Enter:
   - Name: `KUBE_CONFIG`
   - Value: (paste the string above)

5. Click "Add secret"

6. Push a test commit to trigger workflow

That's it! The full pipeline should now work. ✅
